translated: More than anything, I hope you can feel Ena's way of life through the music and the story.
Everyone, please continue to support Ena.
Please keep cheering her on.
To those who already do, thank you so much.
I'm not Ena myself, but...
as the person who voices her, I feel like...
I'm someone close to her. She's made a new resolution, and I'll work hard as an actress to express her growth, so please keep watching over her.
Thank you.
It's been a short time, but that's all for this ProSeka AfterTalk: Colors of Pure Sense edition.
To everyone watching the stream, how did you like it?
If you haven't finished the story for the "Colors of Pure Sense" event yet...
Did I look a bit silly crying like that?
You can read the whole thing from the Event Story menu once the next event starts.
So please, give it a read.
We're always looking for messages for AfterTalk.
You can submit them through the official ProSeka Discord channel...
or via email.
Please send one in when the next AfterTalk event starts.
Just make sure your messages are related to the event.
It'd be a waste if I couldn't read it because it was about something else.
Right.
In just about ten or twenty seconds...
the 2DMV will be out, so let's watch it together.
I'll watch it as soon as I close this stream, so you should all check it out too.
Well then, I'll see you all again.
Goodbye!
Not yet?
That person...
